---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for FIT Dashboard
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: arpanghosh8453

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Which area of the app does this relate to?**
- [ ] FIT file importing / parsing
- [ ] Activity map / GPS route
- [ ] Telemetry charts (Heart rate, Pace, Power, etc.)
- [ ] Overview dashboard / statistics (Weekly trend, totals)
- [ ] Activity list (filtering, searching, sorting)
- [ ] Database / Persistence
- [ ] Data export (CSV, JSON)
- [ ] Settings / configuration (Units, zones, UI)
- [ ] Web app deployment
- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] Other

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Device model(s) / Brand**
If this feature is specific to certain devices or FIT file formats, please list them (e.g. Garmin Forerunner 955, Coros Pace 3).

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.
